title: Amrutesvara Temple
tagline: Amrutesvara Temple — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: The Amruteshvara temple also spelt "Amrutesvara" or "Amruteshwara", is located in the village of Amruthapura, 67 km north of Chikmagalur town in the Chikkamagaluru district of the
overview.description: The Amruteshvara temple also spelt "Amrutesvara" or "Amruteshwara", is located in the village of Amruthapura, 67 km north of Chikmagalur town in the Chikkamagaluru district of the Karnataka state, India. Located 110 km from Hassan and 50 km from Shimoga on NH 206, Amruthapura is known for the Amruteshvara temple.

topPlaces.name: Tarikere
topPlaces.description: Tarikere is a town, a taluk and is one of the two Subdivisional headquarter in the Chikmagalur district of Karnataka state, India. It is popularly known as gateway of Malnad because the Malnad area starts from here.

topPlaces.name: A. Rangapura
topPlaces.description: A. Rangapura is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Tarikere taluk of Chikkamagaluru district in Karnataka.

items.note: Tarikere is a town, a taluk and is one of the two Subdivisional headquarter in the Chikmagalur district of Karnataka state, India. It is popularly known as gateway of Malnad because the Malnad area starts from here.
A. Rangapura is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Tarikere taluk of Chikkamagaluru district in Karnataka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Amrutesvara Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Amrutesvara Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Amrutesvara Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mangaluru International Airport (136 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (147 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Amrutesvara Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Amrutesvara Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Amrutesvara Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Amrutesvara Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Amrutesvara Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tarikere, A. Rangapura.
